blockers.description: Dimension coverage (0%) is below threshold (80%). 0 gap(s) found. STOP is blocked until all required dimensions have meaningful coverage.

findingDetails.title: Duplicate phase number 037 — Two child phases share number 037
findingDetails.evidence: Two distinct folders exist at 037: enforcement build (predecessor: 036) and routing/integration research (predecessor: 028). Both are complete, independently authored, and have no supersession relationship.
findingDetails.recommendation: Renumber one to a unique number. Update parent phase map, graph-metadata.json, and all cross-references.
findingDetails.scopeProof: grep -r '037-' confirms both folders exist with distinct specs.

findingDetails.title: Duplicate phase number 041 — Two child phases share number 041, one is unfilled template
findingDetails.evidence: 041-design-command-upgrade is unfilled scaffold: packet_pointer='scaffold/...', session_id='scaffold-scaffold/...', template placeholders throughout. 041-sk-design-overview-conformance is complete with completion_pct=100.
findingDetails.recommendation: If 041-design-command-upgrade is intended, renumber. If accidental, delete. Template must be filled or removed.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Both folders verified at 041-. Direct reads confirm template vs complete.

findingDetails.title: Parent phase map truncated at 021 — 22 phases (022-043) undocumented
findingDetails.evidence: PHASE DOCUMENTATION MAP lists only phases 001-021. Strategy §15 documents full 43-phase list. No alternate index document exists.
findingDetails.recommendation: Append rows for phases 022-043 to the parent PHASE DOCUMENTATION MAP.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Strategy lists 43 phases; parent spec.md lists 21. graph-metadata.json children_ids also incomplete.

findingDetails.title: Parent 'Complete' status contradicts unfinished state
findingDetails.evidence: Line 41: Status=Complete. Line 23: completion_pct=0. Phase map incomplete, 016-021 planned, 042 empty, 041 template-only.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update status to reflect actual state (e.g., 'Active') or fix all gaps then claim Complete.
findingDetails.scopeProof: 5 pieces of evidence show unfinished state. graph-metadata.json derived.status='complete' inherits same error.

findingDetails.title: Phase 042 has no spec documents — empty scaffold
findingDetails.evidence: Directory contains only review/ subdirectory. No spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, implementation-summary.md, description.json, or graph-metadata.json. 043 spec.md references 042 as sibling review.
findingDetails.recommendation: Create minimal spec.md documenting the review scope, or delete empty phase and move review artifacts to 043.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Directory listing confirms zero spec docs. 043 spec.md confirms 042 produced review findings.

findingDetails.title: 041-design-command-upgrade is unfilled scaffold template
findingDetails.evidence: Template placeholders throughout; trigger_phrases are template defaults ('feature','specification','name','template'); packet_pointer='scaffold/...'; session_id='scaffold-scaffold/...'. Strategy falsely lists as 'complete'.
findingDetails.recommendation: Fill spec.md with real content or remove phase. Correct strategy status claim.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct read of spec.md confirms all content is template placeholders.

findingDetails.title: graph-metadata.json children_ids stale/broken references and missing phases
findingDetails.evidence: Line 41: 031-design-context-benchmark (actual: 035). Line 42: 032-design-context-hardening (actual: 036). Missing: 039, 041x2, 042, 043, 037-routing.
findingDetails.recommendation: Regenerate graph-metadata.json after fixing duplicate phase numbers.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared 37 children_ids entries against 43 actual phases. 2 stale references, 6+ missing.

findingDetails.title: All session_dedup fingerprints are zero-placeholders
findingDetails.evidence: Every sampled spec.md and implementation-summary.md has fingerprint='sha256:0000...000'. Systematic issue across 10+ files.
findingDetails.recommendation: Run generate-context.js on each phase to populate real content-based fingerprints.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Spot-checked 10+ files across different lifecycle stages — all show zero fingerprint.

findingDetails.title: 001-corpus-research spec.md has stale scaffold validation artifacts
findingDetails.evidence: Lines 178-189 contain SCAFFOLD_VALIDATION_COUNTS with orphaned REQ IDs and Given placeholders from template scaffolding.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the scaffold artifact block from completed spec.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Only verified in 001 — may exist in other phases too.

noveltyJustification: All 9 findings are new — prior review had zero findings. Every finding carries fresh file:line evidence from direct reads of previously unreviewed spec documents. Duplicate phase numbers, truncated phase map, and template-only phases were identified but never documented as review findings before.

All hits verified as false positives (design-token vocabulary, self-check confirmations, /tmp artifact paths, routing defaultMode discussions). No credential exposure, command injection, auth bypass, path disclosure, or weak default configs found.

/tmp/bestel-card.png in 035 benchmark: ruled out as expected benchmark screenshot output

Auth bypass from bypass term matches

findingDetails.title: Handoff Criteria Table Incomplete — Only 5 of 43+ Phase Transitions Documented
findingDetails.evidence: Parent spec.md Phase Handoff Criteria table (lines 130-138) lists 001→002 through 005→006 only. 37+ transitions undocumented. Strategy §15 confirms 43 phases.
findingDetails.recommendation: Backfill handoff criteria for all phase transitions, or document that individual phase predecessor fields are sufficient.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Verified lines 130-138; cross-referenced with strategy §15 phase count.

findingDetails.title: graph-metadata.json children_ids missing 7 phases, 2 stale entries
findingDetails.evidence: children_ids has 41 entries for 43 phases. Missing: 037-routing, 039, 041-cmd-upgrade, 041-overview-conformance, 042, 043. Stale: line 41 031-design-context-benchmark (→035), line 42 032-design-context-hardening (→036). Lines 34-35: 029 before 028 (out of order).
findingDetails.recommendation: Add missing phases, fix stale references, reorder numerically.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared 41 children_ids against 43 actual phase directories.

findingDetails.title: graph-metadata.json children_ids out of numeric order (029 before 028)
findingDetails.evidence: Line 34: 029-design-context-loading precedes line 35: 028-impeccable-design-research. Rest of array approximately ascending.
findingDetails.recommendation: Reorder children_ids numerically.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct observation.

findingDetails.title: Duplicate 037/041 numbering creates tool-level cross-reference ambiguity
findingDetails.evidence: Prose references use full slugs (unambiguous), but number-only tools (resume-by-number, validate.sh --recursive, graph-metadata resolution) cannot distinguish duplicates.
findingDetails.recommendation: Renumber duplicates to unique numbers.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Grep confirmed 14 references to 037- across phases; 5 references to 041-. All use full slugs.

findingDetails.title: resource-map.md missing — no track-level resource index
findingDetails.evidence: Directory listing confirms resource-map.md does not exist. Strategy §13 acknowledges absence.
findingDetails.recommendation: Generate resource-map.md for cross-phase resource visibility.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Directory listing verified.

noveltyJustification: Two new P1 findings (handoff table incompleteness, graph-metadata children_ids gaps) plus three P2 findings (ordering, duplicate ambiguity, missing resource-map). P1-011 refines P1-007 with stronger evidence. Checklist evidence traceability confirmed clean. No new P0 findings.

037 duplicate references unambiguous at prose level but ambiguous for tools
description.json level:phase on phase parent (convention-dependent, not classified)
007 checklist CHK-002 review-report.md files not individually verified
ruledOut: description.json level field as bug

checklist evidence fraud

findingDetails.title: Stale scaffold session_id in completed phase 040 spec.md
findingDetails.evidence: session_id reads "scaffold-session/040-design-playbook-filename-denumbering" (line 21) but completion_pct is 100 (line 23). The implementation-summary.md line 19 correctly uses "remediation/040-...". The scaffold session_id was never updated when the phase transitioned from scaffold to implementation.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update session_id in 040/spec.md from "scaffold-session/040-..." to match the implementation-summary.md value "remediation/040-...".
findingDetails.scopeProof: rg -n "session_id.*scaffold" 040-design-playbook-filename-denumbering/spec.md confirms single instance at line 21. No other completed phases show this pattern.

findingDetails.title: 043 spec.md missing SPECKIT_TEMPLATE_SOURCE marker comment
findingDetails.evidence: All other sampled spec.md files include an HTML comment identifying the template source (e.g., 001:27, 016:30, 022:34, 035:33, 040:27). 043 line 32 is bare: "# Feature Specification: design-review remediation (042 findings)" with no template-source comment.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add "<!-- SPECKIT_TEMPLATE_SOURCE: spec-core + level2-verify | v2.2 -->" (or appropriate template) to line 32 of 043/spec.md.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Visual inspection of 043/spec.md:32 vs other phases confirms the missing comment.

noveltyJustification: Both P2 findings are genuinely new — discovered for the first time in the maintainability dimension. P2-015 (stale scaffold session_id in 040) was not detectable by prior iterations because correctness/security/traceability sweeps focused on different pattern classes. P2-016 (missing SPECKIT_TEMPLATE_SOURCE in 043) required visual comparison of frontmatter structure across 6 sampled phases — a maintainability-specific technique.
filesReviewed: all 43 phases (grep: placeholders, statuses, naming violations, broken refs)
edgeCases: 040 scaffold session_id vs complete status: spec.md content is substantively accurate; session_id field is a metadata artifact only — downgraded to P2
Template source versioning: all sampled phases use v2.2; no v1.x or v3.x drift detected
016 HVR_REFERENCE unique: 016 includes HVR_REFERENCE comment which no other phase includes — intentional for its Level 2 checklist
ruledOut: 003 'scaffold' in packet_pointer as finding (phase name, not artifact)
016 HVR_REFERENCE as template drift (intentional Level 2 pattern)
Template source comment variations as inconsistency (Level-appropriate)
040 session_id mismatch as P1 (metadata-only artifact, downgraded to P2)
Stale cross-references to 044+ (none found)
Naming convention violations (none found beyond known 037/041 duplicates)

findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct read of strategy §15 line 197 (planned) vs checklist summary (12/12 P0 verified) + impl-summary status=complete confirms mismatch. Same pattern as P2-017.

noveltyJustification: 1 new P2 (weight 1) + P2-017 cross-phase pattern refinement (weight 0.5 at 0.5x = 0.25). Weighted new = 1.25. Accumulated prior = 63. Total = 64.25. Ratio = 1.25/64.25 ≈ 0.019. Low ratio expected for 6th iteration — second traceability pass confirmed checklist evidence clean and surfaced only stale-strategy pattern already seen in prior iteration.

findingDetails.title: Strategy §15 status stale for 020-benchmark-fixtures — phase is complete but listed as planned
findingDetails.evidence: Strategy §15 line 206 lists 020 as planned but spec.md:26 shows completion_pct=100 with description stating 'Completed Level-2 implementation phase' and recent_action='Mode A reports captured'. Same stale-pattern as P2-017 (021) and P2-018 (016).
findingDetails.recommendation: Update strategy.md §15 status for 020 from planned to complete.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct read of 020/spec.md:26 confirms completion_pct=100 with completed description. Direct read of strategy §15 line 206 confirms planned label.

findingDetails.title: 016-021 cluster 50% staleness — 3 of 6 'planned' phases actually complete
findingDetails.evidence: Of the 6 phases in the 016-021 cluster, 3 are confirmed complete (016, 020, 021) and 3 are genuinely planned (017, 018, 019). The 50% staleness rate suggests the strategy §15 status column has not been refreshed since initial scaffolding.
findingDetails.recommendation: Full audit of strategy §15 status column against all 43 phases using completion_pct and description fields as ground truth.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Cross-referenced all 6 phases in the cluster: 3 complete vs 3 planned. Used strategy §15 table, all 6 spec.md frontmatter fields.

findingDetails.title: 017/018/019 have full documentation but completion_pct=0 — well-scaffolded not started anti-pattern
findingDetails.evidence: All three phases have complete documentation sets including checklist.md and implementation-summary.md despite completion_pct=0 and descriptions beginning with 'Planned... Not started.' The checklists and implementation summaries contain expected template structure but represent documentation written before any implementation work. Creates a documentation-completeness false-positive when counting files.
findingDetails.recommendation: If scaffolding convention is deliberate, document it in strategy §15 or parent spec.md.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Confirmed completion_pct=0 for all three via direct reads. Confirmed checklist.md and implementation-summary.md existence via prior traceability verification (iter 6).

noveltyJustification: 3 new P2 (weight 1 each = 3). Accumulated weighted prior = 63 (from iter 6). Plus 3 refinements (0.5x each = 1.5). Total = 64.5 + 3 = 67.5. Ratio = 3/67.5 ≈ 0.044. Low ratio expected for 7th iteration — second maintainability pass surfaced only incremental stale-strategy findings in already-identified 016-021 cluster.
findingRefs: P2-016 (043 missing template source — now RESOLVED)

017/018/019 completion_pct=0 — genuinely planned, strategy correct
